source_basis: Fixture peer-review report; no draft, source list, or literature search reviewed.
what_i_can_verify: The artifact follows the shared book artifact schema.
what_remains_uncertain: Real peer-review critique requires the thesis, evidence base, field context, and review goal.
user_verification_needed: Verify objections against the actual argument and source base before using them as revision instructions.

process_passport.source_basis: Fixture peer-review report; no draft, source list, or literature search reviewed.
process_passport.source_access_level: fixture only; no live source access verified
process_passport.corpus_coverage: Fixture artifact only; no corpus coverage or representativeness was verified.
tool_use: No manuscript, source list, field corpus, or specialist review was checked.
unresolved_risks: Real peer-review critique requires the thesis, evidence base, field context, and review goal.
handoff_limits: Use this fixture only to validate peer-review report structure and handoff limits.

charitable_restatement: The fixture thesis is strongest when narrowly framed.

review_objections.objection: The evidence base is too thin for the visible claim.
review_objections.why_it_matters: The draft may overreach the evidence visible in the fixture.
review_objections.falsifying_evidence: A stronger source base could materially weaken this objection.
review_objections.revision_strategy: Narrow the claim and add evidence before expanding scope.

rival_explanations: Alternative mechanism not ruled out in the fixture.
